ADR sections: Status/Context (three S-0184 modes + ADR 0079 falsified recurrence interval + S-0086 scale-back precedent + upstream activity findings — PR #1424 merged, PR #1511 + PR #1463 + Issue #1489 + Issue #1082 open — and the @meretrout 2026-05-15 scale-boundedness of Mode 2)/Decision (six commitments: empirical verification first, maintenance for verified gaps, upstream coordination, ADR 0079 recurrence investigation, substrate preservation, A3-now future option)/Alternatives Considered per ADR 0077 (A1-INITIAL, A2, A3-now, hybrid all rejected with full Pros/Cons/Rejected-because)/Load-bearing premises per ADR 0084 (cross-cutting trigger fires)/Consequences (S-0186+ deliverables enumerated)/See also. outcome_summary: ADR 0090 authored committing to A1-PROPER — comprehensive in-project fix campaign with scheduled maintenance + upstream coordination + empirical investigation. Substrate (MemPalace) preserved per S-0086 scale-back precedent (narrow rather than replace). Four rounds of plan-mode pushback exercised the ADR 0084 extraction step in practice: R1 hybrid→patch-and-run; R2 A3-now→glossed coupling costs (embedding-API dependency, hook rewrites, ~500+ drawer migration, S-0093 tooling replacement); R3 A1-PROPER converged; R4 upstream investigation surfaced PR #1424 ALREADY MERGED (Mode 3 partial fix — `_wing_from_transcript_path` reads cwd from JSONL), PR #1511 filed TODAY 2026-05-15 (`MEMPALACE_WING` env var override), PR #1463 OPEN (Mode 2 BM25 fallback), @meretrout 2026-05-15 correction that Mode 2 is scale-bound at 328K drawers (our 22K palace likely unaffected). Strategic shift: from settle-replacement to settle-coordination-posture. Six commitments: empirical verification first (S-0186); maintenance for verified gaps; upstream coordination; ADR 0079 recurrence investigation (39 vs ≥150 sessions falsified); substrate preserved; open A3 future option. Cascade per ADR 0041: See-also back-pointers in ADRs 0056/0057/0079. First-exercise readiness note authored with T1-A through T1-D criteria. MemPalace decision drawer `drawer_paideia_decisions_b569d4b9e712a57a5159f8de` captures the deliberation. Issue #131 closed with detailed comment. ENGINE_LOG Added entry. STATE.md ADR count 89→90; next-session-work rotation (S-0186 verification + investigation is the priority). mempalace_unavailable_acknowledged: this session did not invoke `mcp__mempalace__mempalace_search` or `mcp__mempalace__mempalace_diary_read` — the session was a substrate-decision ADR authoring, not a session that needed prior-context recall (boot context came from the audit report S-0184 and the user's framing in Issue #131, which were directly read). The Round 4 upstream investigation used `gh pr list` / `gh issue list` / `gh issue view` rather than mempalace_search because the target was upstream MemPalace/mempalace, not our project's drawers. Diary write + decision drawer captured via MCP (mempalace_activity.diary_write_calls=1, add_drawer_calls=1).
